title: phaius columnaris
intro: Phaius columnaris, also known as the greenhood orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phaius columnaris include treating various conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and skin irritations due to its anti-inflammatory properties, as well as its ability to aid in the healing of wounds. Herbal preparations of Phaius columnaris include infusions and tinctures, which are made by steeping the plant's roots or leaves in hot water or a solvent.
